scripts.clean: turbo run clean && rm -rf .turbo dist node_modules/.cache packages/*/.turbo packages/*/dist apps/*/.turbo apps/*/dist
scripts.db:shell: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yaml exec db psql -U ${DB_USER:-root} -d ${DB_DATABASE:-database}
scripts.dev: phase run pnpm db:start && phase run turbo run dev
scripts.dev:local: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yaml up -d --wait && dotenv -- turbo run dev
scripts.setup-project: pnpm install && phase auth && phase init && husky
scripts.deploy:env:prod: phase secrets export --app hetic-cinema --env production > /tmp/.cinema-prod.env && docker compose --env-file /tmp/.cinema-prod.env -f docker-compose.prod.yaml up --build -d; rm -f /tmp/.cinema-prod.env
scripts.deploy:env:dev: phase secrets export --app hetic-cinema --env development > /tmp/.cinema-dev.env && docker compose --env-file /tmp/.cinema-dev.env -f docker-compose.prod.yaml up --build -d; rm -f /tmp/.cinema-dev.env
scripts.deploy:env:local: docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yaml up --build -d --wait && dotenv -- turbo run dev
